name: create_message
description: Post a new message to a project's message board. Messages enable team discussions, announcements, and sharing updates with all project participants.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Basecamp account.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the project (bucket).

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the message board within the project.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line or title of the message.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The body of the message in HTML or plain text format.
parameters.example: We've completed the wireframes and are moving into design phase.

body.subject: Website redesign progress update
body.content: We've completed the wireframes and are moving into design phase.

body.subject: Website redesign progress update
body.content: We've completed the wireframes and are moving into design phase.
